title: GitHub Feed Test 02
summary: Second remote update to test dashboard refresh without script restart.

banners.title: Refresh Test Update
banners.summary: This update should appear after pressing Refresh in the dashboard.
banners.body: If this update appears without restarting the resource, then the GitHub refresh system is working correctly.

patchNotes.title: Refresh test
patchNotes.text: Dashboard remote feed refreshed and loaded a new update from GitHub.
